name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off, whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — no guilt trip, no hard sell. We just wanted you to know the door is open whenever you'd like to come back.

Dental visits shouldn't feel scary, and if something about your experience didn't land right, we'd genuinely love to hear about it. Just hit reply — a real person on our team reads every message.

If you'd like to give us another try, here's 20% off your next visit (cleaning, consult, whatever you need):

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days. Use it when you book online or mention it at the front desk.

Take care either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a friendly heads up your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in about a week. No pressure at all, just didn't want you to miss it. :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
